series_metadata.series_title: Public Utility Natural Gas Quarterly Excise Tax Statements & Related Documents
series_metadata.series_description: Public Utility Natural Gas Quarterly Excise Tax Statement including related reports, schedules, taxing district recaps, FERC reports, PUCO reports, appraisals, pictures, maps, assessment certificates, transmittals, documentation & correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 5 yrs from date filed. ; Electronic: 5 yrs from date filed
